feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Crystal Reports 2020 Patch 1 Version 14.3.0.3569 CR Developer software (Log4j)
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently using SAP Crystal Reports 2020 Patch 1 Version 14.3.0.3569 CR Developer software

I did a vulnerability scan and I get  a Vulnerability: Remote code execution vulnerability in Apache Commons Text - CVE-2022-42889. How do i remediate this issue?

entry.title: Improve Q&A to show "SAP managed tags" and "labels" all together?
entry.content:
When I look at a question, the SAP Managed Tags are not sufficient to understand the scope of the question, they are too much general. The labels bring more value but are displayed at the end of the question. Is it possible to put them up, right below the SAP Managed Tags?

e.g. In AMDP, is it possible to use a SEQUENCE object? ... - SAP Community

this is the current way to show the question

I'd like to see "SAP managed tags" and "labels" all together:

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: How can I insert a video from https://video.sap.com into my blog?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to create a blog and insert a video from https://video.sap.com into it. 
URL: https://video.sap.com/media/t/1_0wvg5tt7

I run into an issue and an error message is displayed:

Is it possible to include a video from https://video.sap.com?

If not, which platform should be used instead? Youtube?

Thanks for your answer.

entry.title: How and where to see people bio and contact details in Community 2024?
entry.content:
I can't see people bio.

e.g. I'm pretty sure there should be something in About Andre_Fischer - SAP Community

Maybe there's one option to activate in my settings?

Or the bio and contact details (made public by the people) are hidden at another place.

EDIT April 24th: the bio details can be entered here:

Thanks.

Sandra

entry.title: SAP Community All Time - 47 to 50 is missing or is it reserved numbers ??
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues, 

I was wondering why 47 to 50 numbers in All time is not showing , is it reserved numbers ?? any BUG for not showing that… There could be members which are not shown up. I am referring to Ranking no 47, 48, 49 and 50 is missing and not displayed

https://community.sap.com/t5/kudos/leaderboardpage/timerange/all/tab/authors

entry.title: Error "Your post has been adjusted to remove unsupported HTML found in the message body"
entry.content:
Hello!

I am trying to include a table with merged cells in a blog post. However, when I try to save a draft of the post, I encounter an error: "Your post has been adjusted to remove unsupported HTML found in the message body," and the merge operation is deleted. Has anyone had the same issue?

Best regards

entry.title: Seeking Guidance on Moving My SAP MM Career from India to Europe or the Middle East
entry.content: I’ve recently started my career as an SAP Materials Management consultant based in India. I'm planning to move to Europe after gaining some experience here. I would really appreciate any guidance or insights from those with experience — particularly on which European countries offer the best opportunities for a career in SAP, and how many years of experience would be ideal before making the move. Thank you in advance

entry.title: S4 HANA "Profit Center" in line item 0o1 not filled during mid-year legacy asset transfer
entry.content:
When I doing mid-year legacy asset transfer, there always have a error message Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 0o1 not filled . 

* Specify Account Assignment Types for Account Assignment Objects  already configured.

entry.title: How to do ECC field comparison with S/4hana for data load
entry.content: How to do ECC field comparison with S/4hana for data load

entry.title: My blog does not get posted since 3 weeks
entry.content:
I have written a blog and it is submitted for review since 3 weeks.When will it be posted?

I have made myself familiar with the respective blog posting rules, it is even reviewed by my UA,

best regards,

Michael

entry.title: (RAP Application) - Using incoming value how to hide the entities (section) dynamically
entry.content:
Hi Developers,  

    My requirement is to conditionally hide sections based on a received value, but unfortunately. The solutions I have found so far are not adequate for my specific needs, and I'm continuing to search for a better solution.   

Help me out to overcome my issue   

Given the situation:
The system should dynamically manage the visibility of the partner entity during sales order creation, such that when the sales order type is one of 'MAKO', 'RTTC', or 'RTTR', the partner entity will be hidden from Application; conversely, for any other sales order type, the partner entity field must be shown to the user.

Found solutions:   

  1. Using Virtual Element in projection view  

         Some of the drawbacks include: 
            The entity (sections) cannot be hidden based on the incoming values. 
            Virtual element implementation will call only read the entity data not for modification face.  

     2. Control Fields with UI.Hidden Annotation  

  • Define Control Fields: Create control fields in your CDS view entity that determine the visibility of entities or sections.  
  • Bind to UI.Hidden: Use the UI.Hidden annotation and bind it to the control fields. This allows you to dynamically control visibility based on the values of these fields.  
  • Set Values Dynamically: Implement determination logic in your behavior definition to set the control field values based on incoming data.  

Some of the drawbacks include: 

  1. Unnecessarily create a field in CDS views. 
  2. Real-time customers won’t accept the dummy fields.  

       To illustrate:   

  1. Within my application, there are 10 sections, and in each section, I encounter difficulty in creating a field within my CDS view entity. Even though I managed to create 10 fields currently and they function as intended, there is a concern that future issues may arise once the application is handed over to the customer.  
  2. Because the customer wants to add another entity (Section) via the RAP Extension and simultaneously conceal a section contingent on a specific field's value, I cannot compel them to introduce an unnecessary placeholder field within their CDS view.   

 

Regards, 

Udhaya

entry.title: Add selection criteria in F-28
entry.content: our user has a requirement to filter the transaction by assignment field instead of BP code. may i know any possibility to add the assignment field (BSEG-ZUONR) in following page?

entry.title: getting "system" as value for "createdBy" aspect in sap capm
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In sap capm project for the createdBy filed instead of user name as value it is taking "system" even i have mentioned @CDS.on.insert: $user;

also i have tried with "managed" aspects but getting "system" as the value for "createdBy" field.
could anyone please help me to resolve this issue, to get the real time user info in my real time project.

note: in package.json i already have:

"cds": {
    "requires": {
      "auth": "xsuaa",



Thanks in Advance

entry.title: My Inbox PO Link Opens ME23N Instead of Fiori App "Manage Purchase Orders"
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

 

I hope someone can help me or guide me on this issue I'm currently analyzing.

 

In My Inbox, when clicking the Purchase Order (PO) number link then clicking Manage Purchase Orders, it currently opens the SAP GUI transaction ME23N. However, the requirement is to open the Fiori app "Manage Purchase Orders" instead, meaning it will open the details page of this specific Purchase Order number

 

 

I was advised to check the semantic object configuration in the CDS or how the link is generated in the detail page. I also checked the network calls, and it seems the data is coming from a CDS with prefix C_ or possibly I_.

 

My questions are:

 

Where can I check or change the navigation target for the PO link in My Inbox?

 

Is it possible to redirect the navigation to the "Manage Purchase Orders" Fiori app using intent-based navigation?

 

Should this be done via CDS annotation (e.g., @Consumption.semanticObject) or through Fiori app extensions?

 

Has anyone done a similar implementation or redirection from ME23N to a Fiori app?

 

Any help or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

 

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Tracking URL
entry.content:
Hi, would anybody know how to return Tracking Info using oData or Webservice ?

I can't seem to find it anywhere in OutBoundDelivery root

 

Regards,

Mark

entry.title: Reg the BTP development model
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

We are trying to leverage the BTP for the custom requirements like ABAP program with variant selection and job processing. 

So we can leverage the spring boot applicaiton in BTP by calling the RAP API to get the data from on-stack. but the challenge is to have flexibility for the users to provide the similar to selection screen with variant maintainance. 

any suggestions?

entry.title: Clearing program J_3RCALD doesnt apply FIFO method
entry.content:
Hello,

We are having an issue following the FIFO method for customer payments, when a credit memo invoice is posted for a customer. The order of the documents to clear is changing , not following the FIFO method, when a credit memo exists. The credit memo is created with a reference to an invoice.

In the clearing program J_3RCALD, Partial payment is selected as clearing process, and in OB74 we have not selected any rule for account type D, leaving it blank.

How can the FIFO method still apply, even when a credit memo invoice is posted?

FBL5N:

In an example, the doc number in yellow, which is third in order to clear, according to the incoming payment, is not selected in the clearing program:

J3RCALD:

 

Thank you,

entry.title: Question about SF ATS adoption in China
entry.content:
Hello,

we have a question.

We are developing the ATS module in SF. Our SuccessFactors data center is based in EU.

We have a question about the adoption in China, and its compliance according to the PIPL , considering that the ATS involves senstive personal data (such as National ID, Financial information etc) and that the regulations for handling such data are stricter than those for customer data

 

Do yo experiences of similiar scenarios - I mean of ATS adopted in china and with a data center based in eu?

 

Thanks in advance for your response

entry.title: Error in posting Gl entry
entry.content:
I am trying to do a posting and I am getting the this error

No Amount tolerance range entered for your company code XXXX. Even after completed tolerance grp

entry.title: Message No. 00058
entry.content:
Hi,

Entry APOH   does not exist in T001K (check entry)

Message No. 00058

I have created material type APOH . But when I am goint to check via mm01 that timei am facing the issue .

Please tell me , how Can I solve this error in SAP MM
